queries.reconstructed_sql_run: SELECT AVG(T2.LifeExpectancy) FROM CountryLanguage AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Code WHERE T1.Language = 'Japanese'

queries.sql: SELECT T2.Name, COUNT(T1.Name) FROM City AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Code WHERE T2.SurfaceArea = 652090 GROUP BY T2.Name
queries.question: How many cities are there in the country with the surface area of 652090?
queries.original_sql_run: SELECT T2.Name, COUNT(T1.Name) FROM City AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Code WHERE T2.SurfaceArea = 652090 GROUP BY T2.Name
queries.reconstructed_sql_run: SELECT T2.Name, COUNT(T1.Name) FROM City AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Code WHERE T2.SurfaceArea = 652090 GROUP BY T2.Name

queries.sql: SELECT T2.Name, T1.Language FROM CountryLanguage AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Code WHERE T2.IndepYear BETWEEN 1980 AND 1995
queries.question: List down the languages of countries with an independence year between 1980 to 1995.
queries.original_sql_run: SELECT T2.Name, T1.Language FROM CountryLanguage AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Code WHERE T2.IndepYear BETWEEN 1980 AND 1995
queries.reconstructed_sql_run: SELECT T2.Name, T1.Language FROM CountryLanguage AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Code WHERE T2.IndepYear BETWEEN 1980 AND 1995

queries.sql: SELECT T2.LifeExpectancy FROM City AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Code WHERE T1.Name = 'Calama'
queries.question: What is the life expectancy of the people living in Calama city?
queries.original_sql_run: SELECT T2.LifeExpectancy FROM City AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Code WHERE T1.Name = 'Calama'
queries.reconstructed_sql_run: SELECT T2.LifeExpectancy FROM City AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Code WHERE T1.Name = 'Calama'

queries.sql: SELECT T1.Language FROM CountryLanguage AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Code WHERE T2.HeadOfState = 'Pierre Buyoya'
queries.question: Provide the language used in the country ruled by Pierre Buyoya.
queries.original_sql_run: SELECT T1.Language FROM CountryLanguage AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Code WHERE T2.HeadOfState = 'Pierre Buyoya'
queries.reconstructed_sql_run: SELECT T1.Language FROM CountryLanguage AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Code WHERE T2.HeadOfState = 'Pierre Buyoya'

queries.sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.District = 'England' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) FROM City AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Code WHERE T2.GovernmentForm = 'Constitutional Monarchy'
queries.question: In countries with constitutional monarchy, what is the percentage of cities located in the district of England?
queries.original_sql_run: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.District = 'England' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) FROM City AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Code WHERE T2.GovernmentForm = 'Constitutional Monarchy'
queries.reconstructed_sql_run: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.District = 'England' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) FROM City AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Code WHERE T2.GovernmentForm = 'Constitutional Monarchy'

queries.sql: SELECT T2.Name FROM City AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Code WHERE T1.Population BETWEEN 140000 AND 150000 GROUP BY T2.Name, LifeExpectancy HAVING LifeExpectancy < ( SELECT AVG(LifeExpectancy) FROM Country ) * 0.8
queries.question: Among the cities with a population between 140000 and 150000, list the country that has life expectancy greater than 80% life expectancy of all countries.
queries.original_sql_run: SELECT T2.Name FROM City AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Code WHERE T1.Population BETWEEN 140000 AND 150000 GROUP BY T2.Name, LifeExpectancy HAVING LifeExpectancy < ( SELECT AVG(LifeExpectancy) FROM Country ) * 0.8
queries.reconstructed_sql_run: SELECT T2.Name FROM City AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Code WHERE T1.Population BETWEEN 140000 AND 150000 GROUP BY T2.Name, LifeExpectancy HAVING LifeExpectancy < ( SELECT AVG(LifeExpectancy) FROM Country ) * 0.8

queries.sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.GovernmentForm = 'Republic' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) FROM CountryLanguage AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Code WHERE T1.Language = 'Italian'
queries.question: Among the countries that use Italian as their language, what is the percentage of republic countries?
queries.original_sql_run: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.GovernmentForm = 'Republic' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) FROM CountryLanguage AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Code WHERE T1.Language = 'Italian'
queries.reconstructed_sql_run: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.GovernmentForm = 'Republic' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) FROM CountryLanguage AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Code WHERE T1.Language = 'Italian'
